title: An Act authorizing the Adams Fire District to allow firefighters to continue to serve past the age of 65

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Barrett of North Adams, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of John Barrett, III relative to authorizing the firefighters of the Adams Fire District to continue service past the age of 65.  Public Service.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on House Rules
Reported, referred to the committee on Joint Rules, reported, rules suspended and referred to the committee on Public Service

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/14/2026 from 11:00 AM-04:00 PM in A-1
